gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/355)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/355)
text: سُئِلَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) هَلْ يُطْعَمُ الْمَسَاكِينُ فِي كَفَّارَةِ الْيَمِينِ لُحُومَ الْأَضَاحِيِّ فَقَالَ لَا لِأَنَّهُ قُرْبَانٌ لِلَّهِ .

en.hubeali: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> was asked, ‘Can one feed the poor with regards to an expiation, the flesh of the sacrifice?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said ;’No, because it is an offering for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 9. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith, the following is narrated: “’Amir al-Mu’minin, Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked, ‘Can the Kaffarah (expiation) because of an oath be fed to the destitute from the flesh of the offering animals for al-Hajj?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘No, because it is sacrifice for Allah.’”
